goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of architecture'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 13:45' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

The train should depart from ely and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and arrival time
